brute force two numbers it's too easy to crack it three numbers everything changes it take without a computer take it forever to crack you couldn't do all the combinations right now most safes that are more sophisticated more robust they have four or five numbers but even the most simple safe like a master lock will have three numbers you know right 10 left 23 right 17 but if those numbers are right the safe cracker the old fashioned one he spins the knob he has that click and when he hears that first click he doesn't try to open the safe he knows this three numbers he spins the knob in the other direction listens carefully he has that click right spins it in the other direction when he gets his third click he now opens the safe now if the safe opens that means what he got each number of the combination got it all right the first time but often that won't be the case he might have gotten one of the numbers wrong or there might be more than three numbers so very very powerful metaphor intent meaning that the overriding factor when human beings are making decisions on a logical basis is if I make this decision will it benefit my life now I want you to really think about this carefully in psychology in other words very often when you make your presentation and you're explaining your product or your good or your service you'll lay out an airtight logical case as to why the product is awesome why it makes so in set my sense why it's a great deal but what very often gets left out is will it work for them see when we talk about certainty about the product it's just not that the product itself is good it's that the product will work for them they can apply if it's a knowledge-based product they can apply it and they can succeed I can't tell you how many people are out there right now that and they're being sold to and what's happening is is they're being told all this wonderful stuff about a product that will resolve a pain point what's happening is there the salespeople said so much time on the product but don't ever relate it to that next level will it truly work for them if you don't have that in place you know what they say see they'll typically say you know I'm not that liquid right now that that's like when someone thinks a product is really good that they get it the product makes sense but they don't quite know if they're that oddball that's just not going to be able to use the product and get the benefit in that case the most common objection you get is the money objection I'm not liquid I'm not a good time right now because what they say is they say I like the product it makes sense to me but I don't quite like it enough I'm not actually sure that if I deploy my hard-earned money I deploy my capital I deploy my energy that I'm gonna get the result I need to justify doing it and because of that they hit you with this objection of I'm not really liquid not I'm not interested not I'm let me think of no I'm not liquid right now I'm not liquid right now is that objection that really what it really means is yeah I like the product but I'm not really quite sure if it's for me is it personal to me that's what that objection is about so I want you to be really really careful here that when you're out there writing a pattern and you're and you're you're starting your right this airtight logic you're not gonna front load right knocked out pretty much all the negatives right that's the scale and you think that damn shouldn't this person buy but they're not buying and you're like I don't understand why is this person not buying from me I'll tell you exactly why because they have a very high action threshold the collective level of certainty they got to be 10 10 10 and damn sure of it what does it mean watch what it means it means that this person because of their beliefs about buying and making positions their fulcrum isn't here their fulcrum is right here they have an off-center fulcrum that skews the scale the scale doesn't function normally positives have very little force they don't exert a great force and even one stubborn negative exerts a massive force because the lever the center is right here remember give me 11 up and a larger I'll move the world so when someone's got a really high action threshold what's happening is the power of leverage is allowing one negative to have the force of 20 positives and you can't close them it's the power of leverage working against you so what do we do we use that same power of leverage to work for us what we do is we run a very specific language pattern that actually lowers someone's action special temporarily and what it does is watch all of a sudden this fulcrum it temporarily temporarily moves back to the middle and wham the person buys the scale plunges down they say all right I'll do it that's what's happening when you lower the action threshold they're already you're not change yet about making them more certain they're already certain enough and you're not even knocking out more negatives saying about that what's happening is there's some weird dynamic in their decision-making strategy that's caused the fulcrum to be off-center giving massive weight massive force gravity because of leverage so we use reduced that leverage by changing their beliefs in the moment using language bring the folk from back to center and boom everyone starts to buy it's very very powerful that's the methodology of what a low-radiant action threshold really does now think about this again so that's how do we do that well I'm not gonna go through now because it's just such a you know such a really massive shock it's once you know how to really do this like I'm gonna teach you your your ability close will be enhanced a thousandfold very different than selling to this guy who's going to put it in his house for him and his wife and his child if they have a heart attack yeah then that matters you're going to hold their hand every step of the way and show them in the end that doesn't matter to a politician who's putting it in some random location what really matters to that guy is does he get the recognition does he get more highest level thing what is it that drives everything else I had a good friend of my Tommy Chong was on my podcast it's being released next week we had a funny situation where the two and the two of us we were on diametrically opposed sides of an argument they're not a hot of it of an opinion he had one opinion I had the exact opposite yet we agreed on 97 percent of the facts between those two spots the problem was one fact for each of us was in the other camp so we always make our decision based on that highest value it's the highest value that typically trumps the others so his was one moment so we had very different outcomes we agreed almost everything else what's the highest value of the person you're selling to what's their highest need my guess is you've you've dug very shallowly here into things that probably don't even drive the decision how much is it cost does it work there's customer service for a public official they're not their money they're not sick they're unanswered more than like an hour because that's what people want so please address that at your company and speak to the people it's a very very difficult way to go through life right now with the
